overlap_structure: OVERLAPPING_NOT_NESTED — both components flag distinct subsets beyond the full formulation; neither is vacuous
key_finding: Component A carries ~75% of signal. Component B adds ~25% amplification in non-validation stages. Full formulation consistently strongest in discovery and OOS. Validation anomalous for all groups.
final_verdict_note: Asymmetric but real structure. Not cleanly interaction-dominant (Comp A too strong alone). Not cleanly component-dominated (Comp B adds value). Validation anomalous for all groups.
notes: Both components are non-vacuous, non-nested. Full formulation amplifies Comp A by ~25-30%. Pattern is 'primary component + amplifier' rather than 'genuine interaction.'
